tasks.title: Tasks
tasks.downloadWaiting: Waiting for another task in the same source queue.
tasks.allSourcesPaused: All source queues are paused. Running work can finish; queued work waits.
tasks.sourcePaused: This source queue is paused. Running work can finish; queued work waits.
tasks.task.refreshLibraryMetadata: Refresh library metadata from latest chapters
tasks.notification.title: Norea tasks
tasks.empty.title: No tasks yet
tasks.empty.message: Source browsing, update checks, and downloads appear here after they start.
settings.title: Settings
settings.sectionSelect.label: Settings section
storageSetup.title: Choose media storage
storageSetup.description: Chapter bodies, media files, and media archives are stored under contents/ in the selected folder. Choose it before using the app.
storageSetup.androidDefaultDescription: Chapter bodies and media files are stored in the Android external folder you choose. Select a writable folder before using the app.

settings.app.themeMode.label: Theme mode
settings.app.themeMode.description: Follow the system theme or force a specific mode.

settings.app.appTheme.description: Choose the app color set used by the shell.
settings.app.customAccent.label: Custom accent color
settings.app.customAccent.description: Override the selected theme accent when needed.
settings.app.amoled.label: AMOLED black
settings.app.amoled.description: Use a pure black background in dark mode.
settings.app.androidViewScale.label: Android view size
settings.app.androidViewScale.descriptio: Adjust the Android viewport density from 75% to 100%.
settings.app.fontScale.label: UI scale baseline
settings.app.fontScale.description: Enter the root font size in px used as the app-wide UI scale baseline.
settings.app.localization.title: Localization
settings.app.locale.label: Locale
settings.app.notifications.title: Notifications
settings.app.taskNotifications.label: Task progress
settings.app.taskNotifications.descripti: Show native notifications for chapter downloads and library update work.
settings.app.navigation.title: Navigation
settings.app.historyTab.label: History tab
settings.app.historyTab.description: Show the reading history destination in navigation.
settings.app.updatesTab.label: Updates tab
settings.app.updatesTab.description: Show the library updates destination in navigation.
settings.app.cacheTab.label: Cache tab
settings.app.cacheTab.description: Show the downloaded cache destination in navigation.
settings.app.tasksTab.label: Tasks tab
settings.app.tasksTab.description: Show the background tasks destination in navigation.
settings.app.navLabels.label: Navigation labels
settings.app.navLabels.description: Display text labels next to navigation icons.
settings.app.reset.label: Appearance defaults
settings.app.reset.description: Restore the default app appearance values.
settings.data.restoreWarning: Restoring will replace your current library, chapters, categories, and repository with the contents of the backup file. Continue?
settings.data.mediaStorage.title: Media storage
settings.data.mediaStorage.folder.label: Storage folder
settings.data.mediaStorage.folder.descri: Downloaded chapter bodies, media files, and ZIP archives are stored under contents/ in this folder.
settings.data.mediaStorage.folder.androi: Downloaded chapter bodies and media files are stored in the selected Android external folder.
settings.data.mediaStorage.change.label: Change storage folder
settings.data.mediaStorage.change.descri: New downloaded chapter data is written to the selected folder. Existing downloaded content in that folder is restored for matching library chapters.
settings.data.mediaStorage.change.androi: Choose the Android external storage folder. Existing downloaded content in that folder is restored for matching library chapters.
settings.data.mediaStorage.restore.done: Restored {novels} novels and {chapters} chapters from media storage.
settings.data.backup.title: Backup
settings.data.backupFile.label: Backup file
settings.data.backupFile.description: Write the current app data to a local backup file.
settings.data.maintenance.title: Maintenance
settings.data.libraryMembership.label: Library membership
settings.data.libraryMembership.descript: Remove every library-added novel from the library without deleting novel or chapter metadata.
settings.data.libraryMembership.warning: Remove every library-added novel from the library? Novel and chapter metadata will remain.
settings.data.downloadedContent.label: Downloaded chapters
settings.data.downloadedContent.descript: Clear downloaded chapter content and cached chapter media while keeping novels and reading progress.
settings.data.downloadedContent.warning: Clear all downloaded chapter content and cached media? Novels and reading progress will stay.
settings.data.updatesQueue.label: Updates queue
settings.data.updatesQueue.description: Mark all current library updates as read.
settings.data.updatesQueue.warning: Mark all current library updates as read?
settings.data.readingProgress.label: Reading progress
settings.data.readingProgress.descriptio: Reset per-chapter progress, read state, and reading history.
settings.data.readingProgress.warning: Reset reading progress and read state for every chapter? Novel progress and statistics will be recalculated.
settings.data.network.title: Network identity
settings.data.userAgent.label: Custom User-Agent
settings.data.userAgent.description: Used when a plugin does not set its own User-Agent header. Changes apply after restarting the app.
settings.data.saveUserAgent.label: User-Agent changes
settings.data.saveUserAgent.description: Persist or restore the default network identity.
settings.about.build.title: Build
settings.about.version.label: Version
settings.about.version.description: Shown only when a release workflow stamps this build.
settings.about.buildTime.label: Build time
settings.about.buildTime.description: Shown for GitHub Actions builds; local dev builds leave it blank.
settings.about.platform.label: Platform
settings.about.platform.description: Used to choose a matching release asset or workflow artifact.
settings.about.buildChannel.label: Build channel
settings.about.buildChannel.description: Release and dev builds are stamped by GitHub Actions.
settings.about.updates.title: Manual updates
settings.about.officialUpdate.label: Official release
settings.about.officialUpdate.descriptio: Check the latest GitHub Release and open the installer for this platform.
settings.about.devUpdate.label: Dev build
settings.about.devUpdate.description: Check the newest successful GitHub Actions artifact for this platform.
settings.about.update.checkingDev: Checking the latest successful GitHub Actions build...
settings.about.update.available: {name} is newer and can be installed.
settings.about.update.current: {name} is not newer than this build.
settings.about.update.unknown: {name} was found, but this build has no comparable version or build time.
settings.about.diagnostics.title: Diagnostics
settings.about.logLevel.label: Log level
settings.about.logLevel.description: Choose the minimum app log level. Trace is the most verbose; Off hides app logs.
settings.about.links.title: Links
settings.about.latestRelease.label: Latest release
settings.about.latestRelease.description: Open GitHub Releases in the system browser.
readerSettings.reading.title: Reading
readerSettings.scope.title: Scope
readerSettings.scope.globalDescription: These settings are the base used before source or novel overrides.
readerSettings.scope.sourceDescription: Changes below are saved only to this source-only setting.
readerSettings.scope.novelDescription: Changes below are saved only to this novel-only setting.
readerSettings.scope.disabledDescription: Turn it on before editing. The reader is currently using {scope}.
readerSettings.source.title: {name} reader settings
readerSettings.novel.title: {name} reader settings
readerSettings.sourceScope.description: When enabled, changes below are saved only for this source. Global reader settings are not changed. When disabled, global reader settings are used.
readerSettings.novelScope.description: When enabled, changes below are saved only for this novel. Global and source reader settings are not changed. When disabled, source or global reader settings are used.
readerSettings.readingMode.description: Two-page view is used on medium and larger screens; smaller screens use paged reading.
readerSettings.pageTransitionDuration.de: Control how long paged reader turns take. Lower values turn pages faster.
readerSettings.pdfPageFitMode.descriptio: Choose how PDF pages are sized in paged reader modes.
readerSettings.htmlImagePagingMode.descr: Choose how large images are placed when HTML chapters use paged reading.
readerSettings.fullPageReader.descriptio: Use the whole screen for reading and show the reader controls only from the menu tap area.
readerSettings.keepScreenOn.description: Prevent the device display from sleeping while the reader is open.
readerSettings.text.title: Text
readerSettings.readerTheme.description: Apply a preset or saved reader-only color theme.
readerSettings.background.description: Override the current reader theme background color.
readerSettings.textColor.description: Override the current reader theme body text color.
readerSettings.textSize.description: Set the chapter body font size in pixels.
readerSettings.lineHeight.description: Adjust vertical spacing between lines in the chapter body.
readerSettings.padding.description: Set the inner spacing around chapter text.
readerSettings.font.description: Choose the font used for chapter text.
readerSettings.alignment.description: Choose how chapter paragraphs align inside the reader.
readerSettings.actions.description: Save the current reader colors as a custom theme or restore reader defaults.
readerSettings.controls.title: Controls
readerSettings.swipeGestures.description: Allow swipes to move between pages or reading positions when supported by the reader mode.
readerSettings.tapControls.description: Use screen tap zones for previous, next, and menu actions.
readerSettings.tapPreset.description: Select one 3 by 3 touch-area layout. The center zone always opens the reader menu.
readerSettings.indicators.title: Indicators
readerSettings.seekbar.description: Show a progress seekbar for moving through the current chapter.
readerSettings.verticalSeekbar.descripti: Place the seekbar vertically instead of horizontally.
readerSettings.scrollPercentage.descript: Show the current reading percentage while scrolling.
readerSettings.batteryTimeFooter.descrip: Show device battery and current time in the reader footer.
readerSettings.automation.title: Automation
readerSettings.autoScroll.description: Scroll automatically while the reader is in scroll mode.
readerSettings.autoScrollInterval.descri: Lower values update the scroll position more often.
readerSettings.autoScrollOffset.descript: Control how far the chapter moves on each auto-scroll update.
readerSettings.bionicReading.description: Emphasize leading word fragments to make text scanning easier.
readerSettings.removeExtraParagraphSpaci: Remove oversized blank spacing between parsed paragraphs.
readerSettings.customCssPreset.descripti: Apply layout settings and custom CSS for image-heavy chapters.
readerSettings.customCss.description: Apply CSS overrides to reader content rendering.
readerSettings.customJs.description: Run custom JavaScript in the reader content context.
librarySettings.sort.description: Choose the default order for novels in the Library view.
librarySettings.displayMode.description: Choose how novels are presented in the Library view.
librarySettings.novelsPerRow.description: Set how many novels appear per row when a grid display mode is active.
librarySettings.defaultChapterSort.descr: Choose whether novel detail pages list chapters oldest-first or newest-first.
librarySettings.incognito.description: Progress and unread status still save, but reading history timestamps are not updated while reading.
librarySettings.downloadedBadges.descrip: Show downloaded chapter counts on library items.
librarySettings.unreadBadges.description: Show unread chapter counts on library items.
librarySettings.numberBadges.description: Show numeric badges for library items where the view supports them.
browseSettings.sourceWorkConcurrency.des: Limit how many source executor WebViews can work at the same time.
browseSettings.sourceRequestTimeout.desc: Stop waiting for each source WebView request after this many seconds.
browseSettings.chapterDownloadCooldown.d: Wait this many seconds between chapter downloads from the same source.

library.deleteCategory.message: Delete "{name}"? Novels stay in the library and become uncategorized only if this was their last category.
library.filters.label: Library filters
library.tags.title: Tags
library.batchDownload.allDescription: Queue every chapter that is not downloaded in the selected novels.
library.batchDownload.unreadDescription: Queue unread chapters that are not downloaded in the selected novels.
library.batchDownload.next10Description: Queue up to 10 not downloaded chapters after the current chapter in each selected novel.
library.batchDownload.next30Description: Queue up to 30 not downloaded chapters after the current chapter in each selected novel.
library.deleteSelectedDownloadsConfirm: Delete downloaded content from {count} selected novels? {chapters} downloaded chapters will be cleared.
library.removeSelectedFromLibraryConfirm: Remove {count} selected novels from the library? Downloaded content and metadata will remain.
library.refreshMetadata: Refresh current scope from latest chapters
library.localImport.title: Import local files
library.localImport.duplicateLibrary: This file is already in the library.
library.localImport.duplicateSelected: Another selected file has the same content.
library.localNovel.title: Create local novel
library.localNovel.name: Title
library.localNovel.coverHelp: PNG, JPG, WEBP, GIF, or AVIF up to {size} MB. The image is stored locally.

library.localNovel.coverTooLarge: Cover image must be {size} MB or smaller.
library.localNovel.coverUnsupported: Choose a PNG, JPG, WEBP, GIF, or AVIF image.
library.localNovel.author: Author
library.viewMode.label: View mode
library.selection.unavailable: Bulk actions are not available yet.

browse.description: Search sources and manage plugins or the plugin repository.

browse.fetchContext.empty: No plugin site is prepared yet.
browse.pluginFilters.title: Plugin filters
browse.pluginLanguages.label: Plugin languages
browse.pluginLanguages.description: Filters source lists and the global search scope.
browse.repository.title: Repository
browse.repository.emptyMessage: Set a plugin repository URL, typically the Norea plugin index JSON. Deep-link norea://repo/add?url=... opens the dialog pre-filled.
browse.localPlugin.title: Local plugin file
browse.localPlugin.heading: Install from JavaScript file
browse.localPlugin.description: Choose a .js source plugin. Norea validates the exported plugin contract before registering it.
browse.localPlugin.fileTooLarge: Plugin file is too large. Maximum size is {maxSize}.
browse.noInstalledPlugins.title: No installed plugins
browse.noInstalledPlugins.message: Set a repository and install plugins here before browsing sources.
browse.availableSourcePlugins.title: Available source plugins
browse.sourceInstance.title: Add GitHub source
browse.noAvailablePlugins.title: No available plugins
browse.noAvailablePlugins.noRepository: Set a repository to populate this list.
browse.noAvailablePlugins.failure: The configured repository failed; see the error above.
browse.noAvailablePlugins.empty: No plugins exposed by the configured repository.

globalSearch.scope.title: Before fan-out
globalSearch.waiting: Waiting for this source to finish.
globalSearch.noPlugins.title: No plugins available
globalSearch.noPlugins.message: Install a plugin, clear the language filter, or enable a matching language to use global search.
globalSearch.noSources.title: No sources in scope
globalSearch.noSources.message: Change the scope or select at least one source before searching.
globalSearch.noMatches.message: None of the selected sources matched "{query}".
history.title: Reading history
history.description: One latest read entry per novel - sorted by most recent.
history.summary.title: {novels} novels - {finished} finished

history.filter.searchAria: Search history by novel name, chapter title, or chapter number

history.empty.noHistory.message: When you start reading from your Library, the latest read entry per novel will appear here.

downloads.deleteAllConfirm: Delete all downloaded chapter content ({chapters} chapters, {size})? Novels and reading history stay.
downloads.deleteNovelConfirm: Delete {count} downloaded chapters for "{name}" ({size})? The novel stays indexed.

reader.downloadingChapterMessage: Please wait while the reader fetches this chapter.

reader.notDownloadedMessage: Open this chapter from the novel detail screen to fetch its body before reading offline.

novel.refreshMetadataDescription: Update from the latest saved chapter when the source supports it.
novel.refreshMetadataFullDescription: Re-read the full source chapter list.

novel.noSummary: No summary indexed for this novel.
novel.missingIdMessage: The novel detail screen needs an id query parameter.
novel.noChaptersMessage: No chapters indexed yet for this novel.

source.keywordPrompt: Enter a keyword to search this source.
pluginFilters.empty: This plugin doesn't expose any filters.
updates.title: Updates
updates.description: Refresh installed sources and process newly indexed unread chapters.
updates.failureFooter: Retry runs the full source check again. Failed novels remain visible so the source issue is not hidden by successful rows.
updates.autoLoadMore: More rows load automatically near the bottom.
updates.caughtUpMessage: No unread chapters were discovered after library registration.
updates.caughtUpCurrentMessage: No unread chapters are currently indexed for library novels.
updates.manualCheckMessage: Use the check button to refresh installed source plugins.
